name: Buffer Over-read
description: The product reads from a buffer using indexes or pointers that reference memory locations after the end of the targeted buffer, potentially leaking sensitive data from adjacent memory (e.g., Heartbleed).
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[read_index] exceeds the upper bound of STORAGE[buffer], causing a read past the buffer's end without a CONTROL[upper_bounds_check] validating the index is < buffer_size before the read operation
